consensus_summary: The Adidas 4mm Yoga Mat is a solid mid-range option offering decent cushioning and durability for casual to moderate yoga practice. Users appreciate its attractive design and reasonable price point, though some find the thickness slightly limiting for intense practices. Build quality is generally reliable, making it suitable for beginners and intermediate practitioners.
pros: Attractive blue color and Adidas branding appeal
Adequate cushioning for most yoga styles
cons: 4mm thickness may be thin for joint-sensitive practitioners
Can be slippery without proper foot grip
Limited color options in some regions
Not ideal for high-impact or intense practices
red_flags: Surface grip diminishes after extended wet use
Some reports of mat deterioration after 6-12 months of frequent use
